_instructions: Update 'bio' paragraphs as needed. 'classes' auto-pulls from studentwork.json — no need to duplicate here. Update 'contact' if the email or school info changes.
bio: Hi, I'm Mr Jason — a technology teacher at ICS Bangkok. I teach Applied Technologies, Digital Media, and Business, with a shared belief that the best way to learn is to build real things.
This site is a gallery, a resource hub, and a living record of what we create each semester. Students can find tools, links, past projects for inspiration, and everything else they need.
My teaching philosophy is simple: give students real tools, real constraints, and real creative freedom. The work on this site speaks for itself.

contact.tagline: Questions, feedback, or just want to say hi.
